arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford returns to Manchester United squad for Newcastle clash
arts.sum: Rashford had been left out of the last four United squads after boss Ruben Amorim appeared to question his professionalism.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville spots worrying Ruben Amorim and Erik ten Hag similarity at Man United
arts.sum: Manchester United great turned Sky Sports pundit Gary Neville has spotted a worrying trend in Ruben Amorim's time at Old Trafford so far.

arts.ttl: Chris Dobey and Callan Rydz show true Newcastle United colours ahead of Man United showdown
arts.sum: Both Chris Dobey and Callan Rydz showed their true Newcastle United colours as they progressed through to the quarter-finals of the PDC World Darts Championship at Alexandra Palace. However, the crowd got behind Rydz and he came back to secure his place in the quarter finals.

arts.ttl: Man United players make true feelings clear on Marcus Rashford return after Newcastle decision
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford was included in Manchester United's squad to play Newcastle United despite ongoing question marks on his Old Trafford future.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher sends clear instruction to Ruben Amorim amid worrying Man United prediction
arts.sum: Manchester United are looking for their first victory in three matches against Newcastle in the Premier League on Monday night

arts.ttl: Rashford recalled after four-game Man Utd absence
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has been recalled to Ruben Amorim's Manchester United squad for the visit of Newcastle to Old Trafford, live on Monday Night Football.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford Returns to Manchester United's Squad vs. Newcastle United
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is back in Manchester United's squad ahead of the Red Devils' Premier League clash with Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Why isn’t Bruno Fernandes playing for Manchester United against Newcastle in the Premier League today?
arts.sum: Manuel Ugarte was shown his fifth yellow card of the season in the loss to Wolves, also leading to a one-game ban. Premier League rules state that players who receive five yellow cards at any point in their first 19 games are given a one-match suspension .

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Newcastle LIVE: Premier League team news as Marcus Rashford returns to squad
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is looking for his third win in the league since taking over in November

arts.ttl: Man United's Marcus Rashford transfer problem confirmed after statement released
arts.sum: Manchester United will make Marcus Rashford will be made available for transfer during the winter transfer window this January after being prepared to sell in the summer
